section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a clicking sensation upon examination.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is phrased explicitly as a patient report rather than an observed exam finding; while it occurs during the exam, the wording makes it more consistent with symptom history than objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a subjective symptom report rather than an exam observation or test result, so it fits better in the history section than in objective findings.
